description: Migration: Add entity_id and entity_type columns to document_folders table (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Replace unique constraint on document_folders to include entity scope (COALESCE-based)
Migration: Add is_client_visible boolean column to documents table (default false)
Migration: Add is_client_visible boolean column to document_folders table (default false)
Migration: Add RLS tenant isolation policies to document_folders (SELECT and INSERT)
Migration: Add partial index on documents (tenant, is_client_visible) WHERE is_client_visible = true
Type: Add is_client_visible to IDocument interface
Type: Add entity_id, entity_type, is_client_visible to IDocumentFolder and IFolderNode interfaces
Action: getFolderTree() accepts optional entityId/entityType params and filters accordingly
Action: getFolderTree() returns only global folders (entity_id IS NULL) when no entity params provided
Action: getDocumentsByFolder() respects entity scope parameters
Action: createFolder() accepts entityId, entityType, isClientVisible parameters
Action: toggleDocumentVisibility(documentIds, isClientVisible) bulk-toggles visibility
Action: toggleFolderVisibility(folderId, isClientVisible, cascade?) toggles folder and optionally cascades to documents
Action: ensureEntityFolders(entityId, entityType) stub that returns empty tree
UI: Documents component in entity mode shows FolderTreeView sidebar
UI: FolderTreeView accepts optional entityId/entityType props
UI: VisibilityToggle component with eye/eye-off icon
UI: Visibility badge and toggle shown on DocumentListView rows (MSP context only)
UI: Visibility badge and toggle shown on DocumentCard (MSP context only)
UI: Visibility indicator shown on FolderTreeView folders
Migration: Create document_folder_templates table with tenant, name, entity_type, is_default (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create document_folder_template_items table with folder tree structure (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create document_entity_folder_init tracker table (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Partial unique index (tenant, entity_type) WHERE is_default = true on templates
Migration: RLS policies on all Phase 2 tables
Action: getFolderTemplates(entityType?) returns filtered template list
Action: getFolderTemplate(templateId) returns template with items
Action: createFolderTemplate(data) creates template and items
Action: updateFolderTemplate(templateId, data) updates template and items
Action: deleteFolderTemplate(templateId) deletes template (cascades to items)
Action: setDefaultTemplate(templateId) marks as default, unsets previous default for same entity type
Action: applyTemplateToEntity(templateId, entityId, entityType) creates entity-scoped folders from template
Action: ensureEntityFolders() checks init tracker and applies default template if uninitialized
Action: ensureEntityFolders() is idempotent — skips existing folders on re-run
Action: uploadDocument() auto-files into matching entity folder (best-effort, never fails upload)
UI: FolderTemplateList component showing templates by entity type with default badge
UI: FolderTemplateEditor component with drag-and-drop reorder, add/remove, visibility toggles
UI: Admin settings page/section for Document Templates
UI: Documents entity mode calls ensureEntityFolders() on mount
Action: getClientDocuments(page, limit, filters) returns paginated client-visible docs for authenticated client
Action: getClientDocumentFolders() returns folder tree of client-visible folders
Action: downloadClientDocument(documentId) verifies visibility and client ownership
Action: All client-documents actions wrapped in withAuth() enforcing user_type === 'client'
API: File view route extended to check is_client_visible for client users
API: File view route extended to support contract-associated document access
UI: New client portal documents page at /client-portal/documents
UI: 'Documents' nav link added to ClientPortalLayout between Projects and Appointments
UI: ClientDocumentsPage component with folder tree sidebar and document grid/list
UI: ClientFolderTree component (read-only folder tree for portal)
UI: ClientDocumentCard component (view/download only, no edit/delete)
UI: ClientDocumentFilters component (search, source type, date range)
Regression: Existing inline ticket document display continues unchanged
Migration: Create document_share_links table with token, type, password_hash, expiry, limits, revocation (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create document_share_access_log table (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: RLS policies on Phase 4 tables
Action: createShareLink(input) generates 256-bit token, hashes password if provided, inserts record
Action: getShareLinksForDocument(documentId) returns active (non-revoked) links
Action: revokeShareLink(shareId) soft-revokes link
Action: validateShareToken(token) uses admin connection, validates expiry/revocation/download limits
API: GET /api/share/[token] serves file for valid public shares without session
API: GET /api/share/[token] verifies password for password-protected shares
API: GET /api/share/[token] verifies portal session for portal-authenticated shares
API: GET /api/share/[token] logs access and increments download_count
API: GET /api/share/[token]/info returns document metadata without download
API: Share routes enforce expiry and max_downloads limits
UI: Public share landing page at /share/[token] with download button and minimal layout
UI: Share landing page shows password input for password-protected links
UI: ShareLinkDialog component with share type selector, password input, expiry picker, max downloads
UI: ShareLinkDialog lists existing share links with copy URL and revoke actions
UI: 'Share' option added to document context menu in DocumentListView and DocumentCard
UI: Share indicator icon shown on documents that have active share links
Migration: Create kb_articles table extending documents with article_type, audience, status, review fields, slug (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create kb_article_relations table (related/prerequisite/supersedes) (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create kb_article_templates table with BlockNote JSON template data (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: Create kb_article_reviewers table with review status tracking (includes inline distributeIfCitus)
Migration: RLS policies on all Phase 5 tables
Action: createArticle(data) creates both document and kb_articles record in transaction
Action: updateArticle(articleId, data) updates KB metadata
Action: publishArticle(articleId) sets status=published and auto-sets is_client_visible for client/public audience
Action: archiveArticle(articleId) sets status=archived and clears is_client_visible
Action: submitForReview(articleId, reviewerUserIds) creates reviewer assignments
Action: completeReview(articleId, status, notes) records reviewer decision
Action: getArticles(filters) returns paginated articles with audience/status/type/category filters
Action: getArticle(articleId) returns full article with document content
Action: getStaleArticles() returns articles past next_review_due
Action: recordArticleView(articleId) increments view_count
Action: recordArticleFeedback(articleId, helpful) increments helpful_count or not_helpful_count
Action: getArticleTemplates() returns KB article templates
Action: createArticleFromTicket(ticketId) pre-populates article from ticket resolution data
UI: KBArticleList component with filterable article list (status, audience, type, category)
UI: KBArticleEditor component wrapping DocumentEditor with KB metadata sidebar
UI: KBPublishingControls component for status transitions (Draft/Review/Published/Archived)
UI: KBReviewDashboard component showing articles awaiting review and overdue reviews
UI: KBCategoryTree component for category navigation (reuses standard_categories)
UI: Staleness badge shown on articles past review due date
UI: ClientKBPage component for client portal KB browsing with search and categories
UI: ClientKBArticleView component with read-only rendering and 'Was this helpful?' feedback
UI: KB section added to MSP navigation
UI: Knowledge Base tab/section added to client portal Documents hub
Integration: Articles can be tagged via existing tag system with tagged_type = 'knowledge_base_article'
